name: STMICROEL   DRN
summary: STMICROEL DRN represents depositary receipts of STMicroelectronics N.V. in the Brazilian market. STMicroelectronics is a global semiconductor company that designs, develops, manufactures, and markets a broad range of products, including discrete, standard and application-specific components and subsystems. The company focuses on smart driving, power and energy management, IoT and 5G technologies.
